text:
Pongo (ポンゴ, Pongo) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 208) is a player of the Greed Island game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Pongo is a husky, has short hair, and wears a horizontal-striped sweater. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

After Gon and Killua obtain their first specified slot card "Sword of Truth" in the city of Antokiba, Pongo appears with some other experienced players such as Asta and Kazsule with the intention of stealing it. 

Eventually, Pongo is shown to be still alive in the game, as a bright dot appears next to his name in Gon's contact list. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Pongo is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Pongo's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
